faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Kew Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Kew Gardens residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows. Our team identifies the specific species in your property and applies the most effective treatment method for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are your spider control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We'll provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
